description_long: This is a large, L-shaped executive desk with a woodgrain finish, featuring a spacious main work surface and an attached side cabinet. The desk includes integrated cable management slots on both the main and side surfaces, allowing for organized electronic device setup. The side cabinet is equipped with multiple drawers and a cupboard, each with metallic handles, providing ample storage for office supplies and documents. The desk's design is modern and professional, with clean lines and a sturdy build, suitable for high-traffic or formal environments. The visible surfaces are smooth and polished, with a consistent wood pattern throughout. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, ideal for office or administrative use.
description: A large, L-shaped executive desk with a woodgrain finish, integrated cable slots, and a side cabinet with drawers and cupboard for storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface and the attached side cabinet extending to the right, with visible cable slot and woodgrain texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the end of the side cabinet, visible cable slot, and metallic handle details on the drawers.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full L-shape, both cable slots, and the layout of the main and side surfaces.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel of the main desk and the open storage compartments of the side cabinet.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long, unobstructed front of the main desk, with the side cabinet positioned to the user's right, featuring drawers and a cupboard accessible from the seated position.
attribute_usage_context: executive computer workstation or administrative desk for office work
